name: BlueLinx Holdings Inc.
summary: BlueLinx Holdings Inc. is a leading wholesale two-step distributor of residential and commercial building products in the United States. It purchases products from manufacturers and distributes them to dealers, pro dealers, national home centers, cooperatives, and specialty distributors. Its portfolio spans specialty products (engineered wood, siding, millwork, outdoor living, industrial) and structural products (lumber, plywood, OSB, rebar, remesh), serving all 50 U.S. states from 57 branch cities.

products.name: Engineered Wood Products (EWP)
products.description: Specialty structural wood components distributed to dealers and builders across the U.S.

products.name: Siding
products.description: Exterior cladding products distributed under branded and private-label SKUs.

products.name: Millwork
products.description: Finished wood products including doors, windows, and trim distributed to local markets.

products.name: Outdoor Living Products
products.description: Decking, railing, and related products for residential outdoor construction.

products.name: Specialty Lumber and Panels
products.description: Premium lumber and panel products for specialty construction applications.

products.name: Industrial Products
products.description: Building materials sold to industrial manufacturers through specialty distribution channels.

products.name: Structural Lumber
products.description: Commodity lumber used for structural support in residential and commercial construction.

products.name: Plywood
products.description: Structural panel product distributed primarily for construction framing and sheathing.

products.name: Oriented Strand Board (OSB)
products.description: Commodity structural panel product used in construction projects.

products.name: Rebar and Remesh
products.description: Steel reinforcement products distributed for construction applications.

products.name: Value-Added Services
products.description: Includes LTL delivery, job site delivery, EWP design, milling, fabrication, take-off, and EDI order processing.
